name: chat_completion
description: Generate conversational responses using Mistral's language models. Supports multi-turn conversations, tool calling for agentic workflows, structured JSON output, vision inputs, and real-time streaming.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID to use for generation.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects with 'role' (system/user/assistant/tool) and 'content'.

example.content: What is the capital of France?

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature between 0.0 and 1.0. Lower values are more deterministic.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: Whether to stream the response as server-sent events.

parameters.name: tools
parameters.description: Array of tool/function definitions the model may call.

parameters.name: response_format
parameters.description: Force output format. Set type to 'json_object' for JSON output.

messages.content: What is the capital of France?

message.content: The capital of France is Paris.
